title: Epic Fight: Improved Animations
description: This Resourcepack reworkes some animations for the Epic Fight Mod.
body:
This resource pack reworkes some Epic Fight animations. Among the animations are:

- Complete Axe Moveset
- Fist Moveset
- Dagger Moveset
- Creative Idle
- Landing
- Fall
- Digging
- Float
- Drinking
- Death
- Fist Combo 1-3
- Fist Airslash

See here my Showcase Video

https://youtu.be/XFRFD1O47aE


Feel free to leave feedback and suggest new animations that could be improved.
Try also out my other resource pack, which features a Soulslike death animation.
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/epic-fight-soulslike-death-animation
